result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon search results page with filters applied; a sponsored Rythflo neckband Bluetooth headphones result is visible on the right.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Rythflo Neckband Bluetooth Headphones, ENC IPX7 Sweatproof Sport Earbuds…”
“4.6”
“200+ bought in past month”
“$19.99”
“Long Battery Life”
“Vibration Call Alert”
“AI-enhanced voice clarity”
Left filters show Bluetooth selected.
selected_candidate:
Rythflo Neckband Bluetooth Headphones sponsored result
constraint_evidence:
- Bluetooth neckband earphones: supported (result title says “Neckband Bluetooth Headphones”)
- at least 12 hours playback time: supported (visible “Long Battery Life”; title context also says “50H Playtime”)
- sweat-proof: supported (title includes “Sweatproof” and “IPX7”)
- priced under $50: supported ($19.99 visible)
- at least 4-star rating: supported (4.6 stars visible)
action_target:
Click on the SPAN for the Rythflo product title
success_signals:
Product title/result is visible and appears to match all key constraints; click should open the product page.
failure_signals:
If click lands on the wrong area or opens a different sponsored item; if the result is not actually the intended neckband product.
uncertainty:
The screenshot does not explicitly show the full “50H Playtime” text in the main card, but the action label/context includes it; playback-time constraint is therefore supported by context rather than only the screenshot.

args.task: navigate: Find a Bluetooth neckband earphones on Amazon with at least 12 hours of playback time, sweat-proof, and priced under $50, with at least a 4-star rating.

args.query: Possible failure: selected a neckband headphone product without verifying 12+ hours playback time, sweat-proof, under $50, and 4+ stars; may have exited after only clicking a result and not confirming product details.

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

evidence.claim: The run reaches a product result whose visible details match the task constraints: neckband Bluetooth headphones, sweatproof/IPX7, $19.99, and 4.6 stars, with the high-detail inspection also showing '50H Playtime' / long battery life.
The final step is an exit message after the matching product result is visible, indicating the agent stopped after finding a satisfactory candidate rather than needing additional search.
No failure-pattern memory case is needed to explain this run because the observed behavior is a successful navigation to a matching product result.
